project_type: Unified Campus Operations & Logistics Management Portal
frontend_ui_theme: Layui Admin UI (role-based navigation, admin-style layout)
search_engine: Local Full-Text Search + Local Logistics Search (tokenization, optional synonym + pinyin matching, basic spell correction)
indexing: Incremental Local Indexing (CRUD-triggered) + Nightly Cleanup Job
security_features: Encryption at rest for sensitive fields
